name: compose-scroll-fixture
comment: Reproduces a real Compose app's scrollable-form shape the non-scrollable fixture did NOT: a scrollable LazyColumn where the target field (scrollFieldLow) is below the fold once the keyboard is up. Type scrollFieldA (top), then type+assert scrollFieldLow (deep in the list). If the runner can't find scrollFieldLow, the runner-side FIND-FAIL-DUMP shows whether its node is absent (not composed) or present-but-stale.
